features: Magnetic Seam Guide for Sewing Machines

♛【Magnetic Seam Guide】: Position the magnet on the stitch plate of your embroidery machine to get a consistent seam width every time. Unlike traditional magnetic seam guides, our magnetic seam guide will not go off course when sewing through thick fabrics.Our products compatible with all major quilting and sewing machine brands, making it a versatile tool for your sewing tasks. It helps to sew straight or curved stitch lines and reduces errors.

♛【Easy repositioning】: embroidery machine accessories really help! You can effortlessly remove and reposition the magnetic seam guide if needed. Position the small magnet on the stitch plate of your sewing machine and let the fabric slide against the guide to finish any project precisely.

♛【High Quality Material】: Magnetic seam guide is made of high quality stainless steel and magnets, it is perfect for edge protection, positioning, anti-curling, and more. The magnet stays firmly in place while you sew, ensuring stable and accurate stitching.
♛【 Quality Service】We provide the best service to our customers, if you have any questions (return or replacement, depends on you), please feel free to contact us.
